title: Prometheus Metrics and Alerting Schema
description: JSON Schema covering the core Prometheus data model and alerting configuration structures: metric types, label sets, time series, alerting rules, recording rules, scrape configs, and Alertmanager webhook payloads.

LabelSet.description: A set of key-value label pairs that uniquely identify a time series. Label names must match [a-zA-Z_:][a-zA-Z0-9_:]* and values are arbitrary UTF-8 strings.

SamplePair.description: A [timestamp, value] pair. Timestamp is a Unix float in seconds; value is a string-encoded float to accommodate +Inf, -Inf, and NaN.

prefixItems.description: Unix timestamp in seconds as a float.
Sample value as a string-encoded float.

InstantVector.description: Result of an instant PromQL query — a set of time series, each with a single sample at the evaluation time.

RangeMatrix.description: Result of a range PromQL query — a set of time series, each with multiple samples over the evaluated time range.

VectorSample.description: A single time series with one sample value from an instant query.

value.description: The sample value at the query evaluation time.

MatrixSeries.description: A time series with multiple samples over a range.

values.description: Array of [timestamp, value] pairs over the queried time range.

MetricType.description: The type of a Prometheus metric. Counter always increases; Gauge can go up and down; Histogram and Summary observe values and compute quantiles; Untyped has no defined type.

MetricMetadata.description: Metadata describing a Prometheus metric family as reported by scrape targets.

help.description: Human-readable description of the metric's meaning and usage.

unit.description: Optional unit of the metric (e.g., bytes, seconds, ratio).

AlertingRule.description: An alerting rule definition as found in a Prometheus rules file. Generates alerts when the PromQL expression evaluates to a non-empty set for the specified duration.

alert.description: Name of the alert. Becomes the alertname label value on generated alerts.

expr.description: PromQL expression to evaluate. When it returns a non-empty vector the rule is pending or firing.

for.description: Duration the expression must be true before an alert fires. Alerts are in pending state during this period. E.g., '5m', '1h'.

keep_firing_for.description: Minimum duration to keep an alert firing after the condition is no longer met.

labels.description: Labels to add to the generated alert. These labels are added to all alerts from this rule.

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the alert. Common keys include summary, description, and runbook_url.

RecordingRule.description: A recording rule that precomputes expensive PromQL expressions and saves the results as a new metric. Recording rules reduce query latency for dashboards and alerts.

record.description: Name of the new metric to create. Must be a valid metric name.

expr.description: PromQL expression to evaluate. The result is stored as the recording rule metric.

labels.description: Labels to add to or overwrite in the resulting metric's label set.

RuleGroup.description: A named group of alerting and recording rules. Rules within a group are evaluated sequentially at the group's interval, enabling recording rules to feed into alerting rules.

name.description: Unique name for this rule group within the rules file.

interval.description: Evaluation interval for this rule group. Overrides the global evaluation_interval when set.

limit.description: Maximum number of alerts a rule in this group can produce. 0 means no limit.

rules.description: List of alerting and recording rules in this group.

RuleFile.description: A Prometheus rules file containing one or more rule groups. Rule files are referenced in the Prometheus configuration via rule_files paths.

groups.description: List of rule groups defined in this file.

ScrapeConfig.description: Configuration for a Prometheus scrape job that defines which targets to scrape and how to scrape them.

job_name.description: Name of the scrape job. Appears as the job label on all scraped metrics.

scrape_interval.description: How frequently to scrape targets from this job. Overrides global scrape_interval.

scrape_timeout.description: Per-scrape timeout. Must be less than scrape_interval.

metrics_path.description: HTTP path to scrape metrics from. Defaults to /metrics.

honor_labels.description: When true, Prometheus preserves labels from the scraped target without prefixing conflicts.

honor_timestamps.description: When true, Prometheus uses timestamps from the scraped metrics if present.

params.description: Query parameters to append to the scrape URL.

static_configs.description: Static list of scrape target groups.

relabel_configs.description: Relabeling rules applied to discovered targets before scraping.

metric_relabel_configs.description: Relabeling rules applied to metrics after scraping.

StaticConfig.description: A static list of scrape targets with optional labels.

targets.description: List of scrape targets in host:port format.

labels.description: Labels to assign to all targets in this group.

RelabelConfig.description: A relabeling rule that transforms label sets on discovered targets or scraped metrics.

source_labels.description: Labels whose values are joined with separator and matched against regex.

target_label.description: Label to write the result of replace action into.

regex.description: Regular expression to match against the source label value.

replacement.description: Replacement string for replace action. Can use $1 capture groups.

AlertGroupWebhookPayload.description: The webhook payload sent by Alertmanager to configured webhook receivers when alert groups fire or resolve.

groupKey.description: Key identifying this alert group based on routing label values.

truncatedAlerts.description: Number of alerts omitted due to max_alerts configuration.

status.description: Whether any alerts in the group are still firing.

groupLabels.description: Labels used to group these alerts.

commonLabels.description: Labels present on all alerts in the group.

commonAnnotations.description: Annotations present on all alerts in the group.

externalURL.description: External URL of the Alertmanager instance.

WebhookAlert.description: An individual alert within an Alertmanager webhook payload.

annotations.description: Alert annotations including summary, description, and runbook_url.

startsAt.description: Timestamp when the alert began firing.

endsAt.description: Timestamp when the alert resolved or far-future if still firing.

generatorURL.description: URL to the Prometheus expression that triggered this alert.

fingerprint.description: Hash fingerprint of the alert's label set for deduplication.
